lyrics.text: Where there's a will, there's a way, kinda beautiful
lyrics.translation: 有志者事竟成，多么美好

lyrics.text: And every night has its day, so magical
lyrics.translation: 黑夜过去就是黎明，这里充满神奇

lyrics.text: And if there's love in this life, there's no obstacle
lyrics.translation: 如果生活充满爱，世界将不再有阻碍

lyrics.text: That can't be defeated
lyrics.translation: 爱可以战胜一切

lyrics.text: For every tyrant a tear for the vulnerable
lyrics.translation: 每一个残暴的君主都能懂得怜悯

lyrics.text: In every lost soul the bones of a miracle
lyrics.translation: 每一个失落的灵魂中都有创造奇迹的傲骨

lyrics.text: For every dreamer a dream we're unstoppable
lyrics.translation: 每一个梦想家都有无法阻挡的梦想

lyrics.text: With something to believe in
lyrics.translation: 有真诚的信仰

lyrics.text: Monday left me broken
lyrics.translation: 星期一我被无情地击败

lyrics.text: Tuesday I was through with hoping
lyrics.translation: 星期二我就在希望中复活

lyrics.text: Wednesday my empty arms were open
lyrics.translation: 星期三我张开空空如也的双臂

lyrics.text: Thursday waiting for love, waiting for love
lyrics.translation: 星期四等待爱，等待爱的到来

lyrics.text: Thank the stars it's Friday
lyrics.translation: 星期五星辰为我颤动

lyrics.text: I'm burning like a fire gone wild on Saturday
lyrics.translation: 星期六我像疯狂燃烧的野火

lyrics.text: Guess I won't be coming to church on Sunday
lyrics.translation: 星期日我将不会去教堂

lyrics.text: I'll be waiting for love, waiting for love
lyrics.translation: 我会等待爱的到来，等待爱

lyrics.text: To come around
lyrics.translation: 让我苏醒

lyrics.text: We are one of a kind irreplaceable
lyrics.translation: 我们是不可替代的

lyrics.text: How did I get so blind and so cynical
lyrics.translation: 我究竟为何如此盲目如此愤世嫉俗

lyrics.text: If there's love in this life we're unstoppable
lyrics.translation: 假若此生有爱我们便所向披靡

lyrics.text: No we can't be defeated
lyrics.translation: 没有什么能战胜我们

lyrics.translation: 星期一我被无情地击败
